touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Megan Nakamura, Head of Sales at SilverInsights. No answer, left voicemail introducing our onboarding automation platform.
Cold email sent to Megan introducing our platform's ability to streamline eCommerce onboarding processes. No response received.
Second cold call attempt to Megan. No answer, left follow-up voicemail referencing previous outreach.
LinkedIn connection request sent with personalized note about helping SilverInsights scale their customer onboarding. No response.
Follow-up LinkedIn message after connection accepted. Megan responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities for their growing customer base.

questions_asked.question: What specifically can your platform automate in the onboarding flow?
questions_asked.answer: We automate email sequences, document collection, setup workflows, and customer communications. Unlimited automation tier includes custom workflow builders.

touches.ai_summary: Sent LinkedIn message with calendar link to schedule qualification call. No immediate response.
Follow-up email with meeting availability and brief case study of similar eCommerce company. Meeting scheduled for next week.

18-minute qualification call with Megan. Discussed current manual onboarding pain points for their 31-person team. Megan owns sales onboarding process and is looking for ways to scale without hiring. Confirmed budget authority within sales team.

questions_asked.question: How many new customers are you onboarding monthly right now?
questions_asked.answer: About 40-50 new customers per month, growing quickly. Manual process is becoming unsustainable.

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
questions_asked.answer: I handle most vendor decisions for the sales team. Would need to run final pricing by our CFO but I can move quickly.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for standard setup, faster if you have clear workflow requirements already documented.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map current workflows

touches.ai_summary: 15-minute follow-up call to review Megan's current onboarding workflow documentation. Identified 8 potential users across sales and customer success teams. Discussed integration needs with their existing CRM.

questions_asked.question: How many seats would you need initially?
questions_asked.answer: Probably 8 across sales and CS teams who touch new customers.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native integration available with bi-directional sync.

next_steps: Full discovery call with workflow deep-dive

touches.ai_summary: 19-minute discovery call mapping SilverInsights' complete onboarding journey. Identified key automation opportunities in email sequences, document requests, and handoff workflows. Megan confirmed budget range and timeline to implement before Q3.

questions_asked.question: What's your target timeline for having this live?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally by end of next month before our busy season hits.

questions_asked.question: Have you looked at other solutions?
questions_asked.answer: Not seriously. Saw a demo of something else months ago but it was too complex.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the workflow templates or are they fixed?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited automation tier gives you full customization and template building capabilities.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation and platform walkthrough

touches.ai_summary: 48-minute technical evaluation with Megan and two team members from customer success. Walked through platform features, built sample onboarding workflow live, demonstrated integrations. Team engaged and asked detailed implementation questions.

questions_asked.question: Can we trigger workflows based on customer segment or deal size?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, conditional logic and segmentation rules are fully supported.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting do you provide on onboarding metrics?
questions_asked.answer: Dashboard shows completion rates, time-to-onboard, bottlenecks, and custom KPIs you define.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns about the platform so far?
questions_asked.answer: No major concerns. Want to understand pricing for 8 seats before we move forward.

objections: Need to confirm pricing fits within allocated budget for this quarter
next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing breakdown

touches.ai_summary: 22-minute proposal review call. Presented pricing for 8 seats on unlimited automation plan at $5,400 ACV. Megan expressed concern about budget constraints and asked about discounting options. Discussed ROI based on time savings.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the pricing? Our budget is tighter than expected this quarter.
questions_asked.answer: Let me talk to my manager about what we can do. What would make this work for you?

questions_asked.question: What budget range were you expecting?
questions_asked.answer: Closer to $4,000-4,500 annually would be easier to get approved quickly.

objections: Initial pricing above allocated budget for Q2
next_steps: Explore discount options and revised proposal

touches.ai_summary: 17-minute pricing negotiation call. Offered 29% discount bringing ACV to $3,834 to meet budget constraints and close before month end. Megan receptive but mentioned needing to confirm with CFO despite earlier indication she had authority.

questions_asked.question: Can you hold this pricing if I need a few days to get CFO sign-off?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can hold this until end of week. Do you anticipate any issues with approval?

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else the CFO will need to see to approve this?
questions_asked.answer: Just the revised proposal with the new pricing. Should be straightforward.

next_steps: Megan to review with CFO by end of week

touches.ai_summary: 10-minute follow-up call. Megan confirmed CFO verbal approval at discounted rate. Discussed contract terms and next steps for implementation kickoff. Requested minor contract language adjustment on payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure as quarterly billing at this price point.

next_steps: Send final contract with quarterly payment terms
Target signature by end of week

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
